| **CU-003** | 51 months | 15.7 kg | 0.18 mg/kg | q2w | 2026-04-10 | 4.1 mL/min | New enrollment; first dose 2026-03-27 |

**PK model status**
- From the dosing config alone, **nothing looks obviously out of range or inconsistent**.
- The schedules, dose levels, and patient notes all look coherent with active compassionate-use management.
- That said, **this is not a full PK model health check** — it only confirms the latest configured dosing parameters look stable on their face. To verify model stability definitively, I’d need current monitoring/output data rather than just the config.

If you want, I can also format this into a short report document for Dr. Martinez.
